Asra Group of Institutions is a private institute, established in 2009 in Tehsil Bhawanigarh, Punjab. Asra Group of Institutions is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 57 courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels in 15 specialisations such as Agriculture, Anaesthesia, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Digital Marketing. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Full Time mode. Asra Group of Institutions has an annual seat intake of 1966 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Humanities & Social Sciences. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and academic facilities.

review_content.Placements: Percentage should be at least 50% for admission. The college provides no placement after the graduation of completing any course. The college is only responsible for the students' academic percentage while pursuing the degree or course they are engaged in.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite good. The classrooms are comfortable and well-designed from the perspective of infrastructure. The ambience of the college is also quite impressive. Required labs and libraries are available in every department.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with the infrastructure, but staff members are good.

review_content.Placements: The college basically focuses on just providing degrees. So don't expect any type of placement from here. They don't have any relationships with any recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average and doesn't have basic amenities. Buildings for different departments are there, but the college suffers from admissions. So they lack providing good labs, libraries, mess, and canteen. The hostel of the college has no students, so there is no mess. The college also doesn't indulge students in any type of sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure, and it is good for day scholars.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very rare at our college, especially in our course. Only 1-2% of the students got placed on their own by applying to different companies. There was no top recruiting company. Around 30% of the students got internships from our course in web designing and other courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is highly demarcated with labs, a Wi-Fi system, and good infrastructure. For the day scholars, a bus facility is available. The sports ground was very good having synthetic mats. On-campus, there is a canteen providing hygienic food. The hostel building is very nice and had facilities like air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms.

review_summary.college_name: Vanita Vishram Women’s University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and best mentors .

content.Placements: About 80% of students are placed through this course. The highest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA, the average is 2 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. Companies such as Golden Mace, White Range Software, and various other MNCs participated in placements. Around 30% of students secured internships. Common roles included python developer, PHP developer, and UI/UX designer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in college, and also the best teachers and the very best mentors. The quality of food in the canteen was the best, and for the 3 years I spent in that college, I used to have the best food in the canteen, which was freaking hygienic and super tasty and also available at reasonable rates.

individual_reviews.title: Great college with affordable pricing.

content.Placements: A business fair conducted on the college campus itself for final-year students. Hospitals like Ashutosh Hospital interview the students and offer jobs. Each student gets an internship in different hospitals due to our dean's good connections.
content.Infrastructure: Very good facilities. They have two libraries with a lot of books for different backgrounds. There are clean rooms and a good environment with a female warden in the girls hostel. Full protection and safety are provided. Sports Day is also conducted every year with different sports games like chess, badminton, long jump, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are very helpful. My principal MS Abhilasha Agarwal is also very supportive.

content.Placements: I completed my B.Com from Vanita Vishram College. During our time, there was COVID-19, and although there was a placement opportunity, only about 15 to 20% of students participated. After earning my B.Com, I found roles as an admin and accountant as a fresher. The B.Com program covers various subjects like accounting, environmental studies, economics, and banking, which helped me learn different skills.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were big. There was a good vibe in the library too. I did not stay in the hostel so I cannot tell you about it, but some of my friends stayed there, it is very safe. The canteen area was also big. The food was also good. We did a lot of activities on the college campus. I remember the blood donation camps exactly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good teachers, infrastructure, and knowledge.

content.Placements: Students who scored above 9 CGPA are the ones who got the best placements. Of course, study is as important as money. If we study well, the package goes above 2 lacs. Scoring above 9 CGPA is not a big deal at VVWU; they will provide all facilities.
content.Infrastructure: Everything that is important for a good future lies in Vanita Vishram. Classrooms are big, with a projector in each class. The computer lab has 200 PCs. Biological labs are also provided by them. Hostels are clean and provide food much better than other hostels.

individual_reviews.title: Best three years of my life.

content.Placements: The companies which came for placements were like different accounting firms, different banks for the posts like sales department HR department accounts department marketing department, salary was from Rs.10,000 to Rs.25,000 students also got jobs by clearing DBF exam for banking.
content.Infrastructure: We had huge classrooms with advanced technology to learn like projector facility, library was available for all students which didn't even had textbooks but also different books from all over subjects to gain more knowledge computer labs were also available for us.

reviews_list.review_title: I was satisfied with this college because faculty members were very experienced.

review_content.Placements: More than 90% of students got placed in that college. The packages ranged from 2.5 LPA to 6 LPA. Companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma, Lupin, Zydus, and others recruited students. Over 90% of students got internships. Many started their own work after gaining good learning from this college. Now, more than 95% of students are doing well in their lives.
review_content.Infrastructure: There were many facilities that I can't explain in a few words. The mess was the best, as we got home-like food, and the Wi-Fi was fast. Labs were well designed. Sports and games were good, and many people took part. We also enjoyed the theatre at the college.
